description: Step into refined living with this exquisite townhome featuring 3 bedrooms, 2.5 bathrooms, meticulously crafted for modern comfort.The kitchen boasts lavish countertops, expansive islands, and sleek modern cabinets.Enjoy seamless flow between the dining and living areas, perfect for family gatherings.With abundant natural light, charming wooden laminate flooring, and lofty ceilings, the main level feels spacious and inviting.Retreat to the generously sized bedrooms for serene relaxation. Nestled in a vibrant neighborhood with easy access to amenities, schools, and parks.Don't miss out on this exceptional opportunity! Schedule your viewing today. Open house Saturday, Mar 7, 2026 & Sunday, Mar 8, 2026 from 12 pm to 5 pm @ Show Home #31 - 8430 Nottman Street.
